acceptance_criteria.description: 'Back up your identity' section in Settings with 'Generate backup phrase' button
acceptance_criteria.notes: Backup section added to settings with data-testid=generate-backup-phrase-btn

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking generates a BIP-39 mnemonic (24 words) from the private key
acceptance_criteria.notes: mnemonicFromHex uses 256-bit entropy (24 words) to preserve full 32-byte private key

acceptance_criteria.description: Mnemonic shown once with confirmation checkbox
acceptance_criteria.notes: data-testid=mnemonic-display shows phrase, data-testid=backup-confirm-checkbox must be checked

acceptance_criteria.description: After confirmation, nostrBackedUp flag set to true

acceptance_criteria.notes: hexFromMnemonic decodes phrase, derivePublicKeyHex reconstructs keypair, replaceIdentity applied

acceptance_criteria.description: Dismissible reminder banner on groups page when in groups + not backed up

design_decisions: Used 24-word (256-bit entropy) mnemonic to preserve full 32-byte Nostr private key — spec said 12 words but that only covers 16 bytes
